examples: Voices came from afar.; Voices were heard in the distance.
"Oh, grandfather," she cried from afar, "won't you come with us to the pasture tomorrow?"
The children, however, saw from afar that the three servants were coming, and the cook waddling after them.
Eight other people were wounded in the attacks in the town of Tal Afar, they added.
Like them, many of the relief workers have come from afar to help out.
